description_long: This is a modern freestanding bathroom vanity cabinet with a rectangular base and a smooth, light beige finish. The top surface features a round, white vessel sink and a tall, sleek metallic faucet. The front side has two cabinet doors, one of which has a visible wooden accent strip, and the other is plain. The left side of the cabinet includes open shelving with two wooden shelves, providing additional storage space. The back side reveals the internal structure, including hinge hardware and an open central compartment. The overall design is minimalist and functional, suitable for contemporary urban bathrooms or washrooms.
description: A modern freestanding bathroom vanity with a vessel sink, metallic faucet, two cabinet doors, and open shelving on one side.
description_view_0: Front view showing the vessel sink and faucet centered on a smooth, rectangular cabinet base.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the two cabinet doors and the wooden accent strip on the left door.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying open shelving with two wooden shelves beneath the countertop.
description_view_3: Rear view revealing the internal structure, hinge hardware, and an open central compartment.
